response: The city between Normanby le Wold and the A46 Junction between Lincoln and Grimsby is Caistor. Caistor is situated in the West Lindsey district of Lincolnshire, approximately 5 miles south from the town of Caistor, and 17 miles north-east from Lincoln. It lies on the Viking Way and is located just off the A46 between Lincoln and Grimsby.
